articles.title: Articles
articles.glOnly: Article translation is only available for gateway-language projects.
articles.reloadConflict: This article changed on the server — reload.
articles.populateAborted: Population stopped: the source changed. Try again.

templates.title: Note Templates
templates.glOnly: Note-template translation is only available for gateway-language projects.
templates.reloadConflict: This template changed on the server — reload.
templates.saveConflict: Someone else saved this template. Your text is kept — saving again will overwrite their version.
templates.staleSource: The English source changed — review the translation.
templates.pickVersion: Pick a version on the left to preview.
templates.draftDisabledValidated: Un-approve first to draft over an approved translation.

topbar.notImportedHint: not imported — selecting will fetch from DCS
topbar.importedFromSource: Notes imported from the English source ({{repos}}).

mode.tooltip: Switch between Editor and Translator mode

translation.descTranslateQuestions: AI-translate this chapter's questions from the source language.
translation.descTranslate: AI-translate this chapter's notes from the source language.
translation.whyDraft: Review against the source, then approve.
translation.languageMemoryTip: Validated examples and terminology grow as the team approves — the context every future draft is prompted with.

preferences.title: Preferences & Memory
preferences.glOnly: This panel governs how the AI translates for a gateway language. It is available in translation projects only.
preferences.editorOnly: You need editor or admin access to view this panel.

localization.intro: Edit the {{language}} interface strings. English is shown on the left for reference; edit the {{language}} text on the right. Changes take effect immediately and are shared with everyone using {{language}} on their next load. Switch languages using the language menu in the top bar.
localization.introEnglish: You are editing the English source strings themselves. Switch to another language via the top-bar language menu to localize it.
localization.placeholderWarning: Missing placeholder(s): {{tokens}} — keep these so values fill in correctly.
localization.inspectMode: Localization mode (hover + click the real app to edit its text)
localization.inspectHint: Localization mode is on — go back to the app, then hover any text to highlight it and click to edit its translation.
localization.inspectPausedHint: Paused — click around the app normally. Uncheck Pause to resume editing text.
localization.inspectNoKey: Couldn't match this element to a translation key.

users.title: User management
users.intro: Grant or remove editor and admin access for Door43 (DCS) usernames. Role changes take effect within about an hour, once each admin's or editor's browser session refreshes. Read-only viewers aren't managed here — they come automatically from Door43 org membership; this list only covers editor and admin access.
users.teamManagedEdit: This user's role comes from a Door43 team, so this change will be undone the next time their membership is checked. Change their team on Door43 to make it stick.
users.teamManagedRemove: Removed for now — but {{username}} is in a Door43 team, so they will regain access the next time they sign in. Remove them from the team on Door43 to revoke access.
users.loadFailed: Could not load the user list.
users.unverified: Could not verify this username with Door43 — added anyway.

errors.invalid_username: That doesn't look like a valid Door43 username.
errors.dcs_user_not_found: No Door43 user found with that username.
errors.last_admin: Can't remove or demote the last remaining admin.
errors.not_found: That user isn't in the allowlist.

reconcile.allowlistNote: Editor and admin access held in this app. This is not the Door43 org roster — it's who has been granted a role here.
reconcile.notOrgMemberHint: This user holds an app role but isn't in the {{org}} org on Door43.
reconcile.orgNote: The real org roster, read live from Door43 for comparison. Nothing here changes roles — grant or remove access above.
reconcile.unavailable: Couldn't reach Door43 to load the org roster. Role management above still works.
reconcile.truncated: The org has more members than could be listed; this view is incomplete.

preferences.saveForbidden: Only an admin can save these settings.
preferences.conflict: Someone else changed this — reloaded the latest.
preferences.briefIntro: Who this language's translation is for, and the register it should use. This travels with every AI draft.
preferences.registerHelp: Formality the AI should aim for.
preferences.instructionsIntro: Standing guidance injected into every AI draft prompt. Keep it terse and durable — per-note nuance belongs in Terminology and Examples.
preferences.instructionsPlaceholder: e.g. Follow the Book Package Style Sheet. Use an en-dash for verse ranges. Copy the quoted snippet directly from the GL text.
preferences.commonIssuesIntro: Recurring problems translators hit in this language — false friends, grammar traps, formatting habits to avoid. Paste your team's document here; it is injected into every AI draft prompt alongside Instructions.
preferences.commonIssuesPlaceholder: e.g. Do not render 'covenant' as 'agreement' — it loses the binding sense. Avoid the colloquial future particle in narrative.
preferences.charCountOver: Too long — {{count}} of {{max}} characters. Shorten it before saving.
preferences.saveTooLong: Save failed: the text is too long.
preferences.terminologyIntro: Preferred renderings, forbidden terms (with what to use instead), and do-not-translate entries. One concept can have several valid renderings.
preferences.noTerms: No terms yet. Add one below or import a CSV.
preferences.importHelp: Paste CSV with a header row. Required columns: concept_id, source_term. Optional: target_term, status, replacement, comment, tw_link.
preferences.examplesIntro: Approved source→target pairs. These are the validated work the AI learns from as few-shot examples. Un-approving a note removes it from the memory.
preferences.noExamples: No validated examples yet. Approve notes in translation mode to build this memory.
preferences.projectModeIntro: This preset is the global project configuration. It controls source repositories, language, and whether translation workflows are enabled for everyone.
preferences.projectModeForbidden: Only an admin can change the project mode.
preferences.projectModeFailed: Could not update the project mode. Try again.
preferences.projectModeNotEmpty: Each database belongs to one organization. This one already contains another organization's project data, so it can't be repointed to a different org here. To work in that organization, use the Organization switcher at the top of this Setup page to move to its own database — this isn't a broken control.
preferences.projectModeOrgLockHint: Each database belongs to a single organization. Once it holds data, its organization can't be changed here. To work in a different organization, use the Organization switcher at the top of this Setup page to move to that org's own database.
preferences.projectModeLaneBusy: A scripture source replacement is in progress. Finish or cancel it before switching project mode.

detectOrg.label: Set up a new org (draft)
detectOrg.missingRoles: not found — set up this repo on Door43 first
detectOrg.manifestMissing: Could not read a manifest.yaml for this org's repositories — some fields may be incomplete.
detectOrg.forbidden: Access to this org's repositories was denied.
detectOrg.laneHint: Changing an already-active project's lit/sim source later goes through the scripture repositories section below.
detectOrg.projectNotEmpty: This database already holds project data for a different org. One database serves one org/project at a time — switching would let old content export into the new org.
detectOrg.laneSourceMigration: Changing the scripture source on a project that already has text is a migration. Keep the current source, or use "Change scripture source" in Preferences to do it deliberately.
detectOrg.applyFailed: Could not apply the configuration. Please try again.

preferences.exportAdminOnly: Only an admin can export the context pack.
preferences.exportStatus.shrink_refused: Export refused to prevent unexpected content loss
preferences.notFeedingAi: Not yet feeding the AI — preferences sync automatically after the first successful export

scriptureLanes.title: Change scripture source
scriptureLanes.intro: Migrate an already-populated project to a different scripture source. Paste a new Door43 source URL to stage a replacement, or adjust the edit/align permission switches per lane. This is not first-run setup (use the Setup wizard for that) and not book import — it repoints an existing lane's text at a new upstream and restages it.
scriptureLanes.confirmReplace: This will replace {{books}} book(s) ({{verses}} verses) with content from {{owner}}/{{repo}}. Are you sure?
scriptureLanes.pendingTargetBanner: This lane requires a source replacement before content is available.
scriptureLanes.bookRetryHint: {{book}} failed to stage — click to retry, or dismiss to skip it (requires confirmation).
scriptureLanes.confirmWaiveBook: Authorize absence of {{book}}? It will be permanently omitted from this generation. Only do this if the book is truly missing from the source repo.

errors.replacement_already_active: A replacement is already running for this lane.
errors.lane_lease_held: This lane is busy (an import or export is holding it). Try again shortly.
errors.confirmation_required: Confirmation is required to start a replacement.
errors.lane_replacement_required: This lane needs a source replacement before it can be edited.
errors.job_not_found: This replacement job could not be found. It may have already been cancelled or completed.
errors.job_not_ready: This replacement isn't ready to activate yet.
errors.export_lease_held: Cannot activate right now: an export is in progress for this lane. Try again shortly.
errors.export_lease_grace: Cannot activate right now: waiting for an in-progress export to finish. Try again shortly.
errors.activation_cas_failed: Activation failed because the lane changed underneath it. Refresh and try again.

importDialog.notImportedYet: Cannot re-import: {{book}} hasn't been imported yet. Open the book once first.
importDialog.alreadyRunning: Another import is already running for {{book}}. Try again shortly.
importDialog.signIn: Sign in to import from Door43.
importDialog.importFailedGeneric: Import failed. Check your connection and try again.
importDialog.title: Import from Door43
importDialog.description: Pulls fresh ULT / UST / TN / TQ / TWL content for the selected chapters straight from Door43. Rows already edited by translators are skipped — this is a safe re-seed, not an overwrite.
importDialog.selectAtLeastOne: Select at least one resource to import.

questions.question: Question
questions.aiPipelineTooltip: Generated by an AI pipeline. Your next edit clears this label.

words.translateTooltip: translate to Hebrew/Greek using ULT alignment
words.occurrenceTooltip: occurrence — which instance of this quote in the verse (usually 1)
words.pickerOpen: picker open · {{count}} selected — click ULT/UST or Hebrew words
words.buildQuoteTooltip: build the Hebrew/Greek quote by picking aligned words
words.glossTooltip: ULT words aligned to this quote (read-only)
words.disambigTooltip: This word has {{count}} Translation Words articles — click to choose the right one
words.noAlignmentMatch: No ULT alignment match for “{{quote}}” in this verse.

sync.conflictsTooltip: some edits conflict with the server — resolve below
sync.failedTooltip: some edits failed permanently — discard below
sync.savedTooltip: all your edits are saved to the cloud
sync.resolveConflictTooltip: version mismatch — retry with current server version (your edit wins)
sync.discardConfirmBody: These edits never reached the server. Discarding deletes them from this device permanently — they cannot be recovered.
sync.updateAvailableTooltip: A newer version is deployed. Click to reload and get the latest fixes.
sync.onLatestVersion: You're on the latest version you've loaded.

workspace.switchTooltip: switch which Door43 organization you're editing
workspace.membershipUnknownHint: Couldn't confirm your Door43 org memberships — this list may be incomplete. Sign in again to refresh.
workspace.notMemberTooltip: you need Door43 membership in this org to switch to it
workspace.notAMember: You're not a member of that organization.
workspace.noLongerAvailable: That workspace is no longer available.
workspace.unsavedEditsBlock: Unsaved edits are still syncing ({{n}}) — wait for them to finish before switching workspaces.
workspace.title: Organization
workspace.intro: Choose which Door43 organization you're editing. Each organization uses its own database, so switching reloads the editor.
workspace.indicatorTooltip: Organization — switch it in Preferences → Setup
workspace.chooseIntro: Your Door43 account belongs to more than one organization here. Pick the one you want to work in — you can switch any time in Preferences.
workspace.chooseFailed: Couldn't load your organizations — you can switch later in Preferences.

shell.hideLaneInSidebar: Hide this lane in the sidebar
shell.showLaneInSidebar: Show this lane in the sidebar
shell.clickLinkToAlign: Click the link icon on a ULT or UST verse to start aligning.
shell.tooltipColumns: parallel-column doc view of the current chapter
shell.tooltipBook: whole-book scroll across all enabled versions (lazy loads as you scroll)
shell.tooltipGoToActive: scroll the active verse + its resources back into view
shell.tooltipVersionHistory: version history — view or restore an earlier save
shell.introTooltip: Chapter intro — chapter-level translation notes, Psalm superscriptions (\d), and the paragraph / poetry markers that introduce verse 1.
shell.unpinSection: unpin — show {{title}} for the active verse only
shell.pinSection: pin — show {{title}} for every verse in this chapter
shell.checkAllChapter: check {{title}} for every applicable verse in this chapter
shell.aiReady: New AI {{pipelineType}} are ready for this chapter. Save your work, then refresh.
shell.laneFrozen: {{version}} is being replaced — editing is paused until the new source is ready.
shell.laneFrozenQuarantine: Quarantined: {{version}} is being replaced, so this queued edit was not applied.
shell.laneSettled: {{version}} replacement finished — the chapter has been refreshed.
shell.editDroppedLocked: Edit dropped — the AI run for this chapter is mid-flight. Try again after it finishes.
shell.cantPreserveAlignment: This edit can't preserve word alignment on words you didn't change, so it wasn't saved ({{ref}} {{bibleVersion}}{{affected}}). Please note this verse ({{ref}}) for your admin to file a bug-fix review, or re-align in the alignment panel.
shell.editLeftUnaligned_one: This edit left {{count}} word unaligned in {{ref}} {{bibleVersion}} — re-align in the Alignment panel.
shell.editLeftUnaligned_other: This edit left {{count}} words unaligned in {{ref}} {{bibleVersion}} — re-align in the Alignment panel.
shell.chapterLockBanner: AI {{pipelineType}} run in progress for {{book}} {{chapter}} — started {{started}}. Editing is locked for this chapter. You can still mark notes to keep before the new set lands.
shell.bulkCheckBody: This marks {{label}} as checked by you for all {{verseCount}} applicable verses in {{ref}}.
shell.bulkClearBody: This removes your {{label}} checks from all {{verseCount}} applicable verses in {{ref}}.
shell.unsavedAlignmentBody: You have unsaved changes in the alignment editor. Save them before switching verses, discard them, or cancel to stay here.
shell.alignLossIntro: Saving will leave {{phrase}} with no source link in {{ref}}:
shell.alignLossOutro: . That's fine if you meant to re-align — but if it's accidental it will block the nightly export to master until the {{state}} aligned again. Save anyway, or cancel to keep editing.
shell.unsavedDualBody: You have unsaved changes in the side-by-side aligner (alignment edits or reading text). Save them, discard them, or cancel to keep editing.

logos.autoFollowTooltip: Auto-follow active verse in Logos (steals focus on each change)
logos.enableBody: Checking this will cause Logos to steal focus (bring its window to the front) every time you change verses. Fine if you have Logos on a second monitor, but otherwise just use the sync button when you want to move Logos.

pipeline.descGenerate: Aligned literal + simplified text and a draft issues list for the chapter.
pipeline.descNotes: Translation notes (tn) for every verse in the chapter.
pipeline.descTqs: Translation questions (tq) aligned to the current ULT/UST.
pipeline.importFromDoor43Desc: Pull ULT/UST/TN/TQ/TWL — won't clobber local edits.
pipeline.aquiferPullDesc: Import Aquifer translation notes as drafts to review. Existing translated notes are kept and marked approved.
pipeline.aquiferNotImported: Import {{book}} first, then pull Aquifer drafts.
pipeline.resourceFromSourceDesc: Replace this book’s notes and questions with the current English source.
pipeline.resourceConfirmBody: This re-downloads the entire {{book}} book — scripture, notes, questions and word links — and replaces it from DCS. Any local edits to this book will be lost.
pipeline.resourceEditsBody: {{tn}} notes, {{tq}} questions, {{twl}} word links and {{verses}} verses in {{book}} carry local work — human edits, approvals, or AI drafts. All of it will be permanently discarded.
pipeline.confirmRun: Run {{label}}? {{duration}} per chapter — you can keep working in other chapters while it runs.
pipeline.asymmetricAlignment: Asymmetric alignment: runs as two pipelines back-to-back (ULT first).
pipeline.selectAtLeastOne: Select at least one of ULT or UST.
pipeline.chapterLockedNote: This chapter is locked while the pipeline runs. You can keep editing other chapters; the AI output will overwrite this one when it completes.
pipeline.anotherTranslatorStarted: Another translator already started this pipeline (job {{jobId}}).
pipeline.signInToStart: Sign in to start a pipeline.
pipeline.couldNotStartGeneric: Could not start the pipeline. Check your connection and try again.
pipeline.onlyOneRuns: Only one runs at a time. Running now:
pipeline.removeFromQueueTooltip: Remove from the queue (only possible before it starts)
pipeline.markAsSeenTooltip: Mark as seen — hides this run from the list

noteCard.versionTooltipRestored: v{{restored}} (restored){{unsaved}} — currently at row v{{version}}; last update {{date}}. Click to view history.
noteCard.versionTooltip: v{{version}}{{unsaved}} — saved {{saved}}; last update {{date}}. Click to view history.
noteCard.cantDiscardInFlight: can't discard while a save is in flight — wait for it to land
noteCard.discardUnsaved: discard unsaved edits — revert to the last saved version of this note
noteCard.savePending: save pending edits to the server
noteCard.addNoteAfter: add a new note after this one
noteCard.buildFromSourceTooltip: open the picker to pick Hebrew/Greek words — or click ULT/UST words and the picker resolves their alignment
noteCard.draftingInBackground: drafting in background — feel free to edit other notes
noteCard.preserveTooltip: Mark this note to survive future AI pipeline runs.
noteCard.hintTooltip: Send this stub to the next AI pipeline run as a hint. The AI will expand it in place; the row survives the sweep.
noteCard.tcmTooltip: Fill with "This could mean" template. Double-click any placeholder (NOTE, ALT) to replace it.
noteCard.shTooltip: Fill with "See how you translated" template.
noteCard.replaceNoteAiBody: This note already has text. Generating with AI will replace both the Quote and Note. You can hit Undo on the toolbar afterwards to restore the original.
noteCard.replaceNoteTemplateBody: This note already has text. Filling from the template will replace it. You can hit Undo on the toolbar afterwards to restore the original.

aligner.noAlignmentData: no alignment data for this verse — either the source has no `\zaln-s` markers, or the verse was recently edited and alignment was cleared.
aligner.colorsTooltip: tint each repeated word with a unique color so matching instances are easy to find
aligner.hoverLinkTooltip: hover any word to highlight its matches and aligned partner everywhere
aligner.dragHint: drag chips · dbl-click Hebrew to split · dbl-click English to unalign
aligner.versionHistory: version history — view or restore an earlier alignment
aligner.openDualTooltip: open {{left}} + {{right}} side by side (aligned to the same Hebrew)
aligner.clearGroupTooltip: clear this group (send English back to the word bank, split compound source)
aligner.mergeCardTooltip: drag onto another card to merge the two groups
aligner.doubleClickSplit: double-click to split out of compound
aligner.unalignTooltip: double-click or drag back to the word bank to unalign
aligner.ghostTooltip: suggested · {{src}} · {{pct}}% — click to accept, × to dismiss
aligner.dualSubtitle: {{left}} ↔ {{right}} · both aligned to {{source}} · hover Hebrew to bridge
aligner.hebrewInfoTooltip: show the Hebrew lexicon tooltip on hover — turn off to see only what's aligned, without the popup covering the panels
aligner.readingLockedTooltip: save or cancel the pending alignment edits before editing the reading text

setup.title: Set up a new org
setup.intro: Point the editor at a Door43 org's repositories: confirm the org and language, choose the sources you pull from, and set your scripture lanes. One database serves one org. Importing and translating books happens later, in the editor.
setup.gatewayAdminIntro: First, create your organization's resource repositories on Door43 (for example, using gatewayAdmin). You'll need one repository per resource:
setup.gatewayAdminChecklist:
• {lang}_tn — translationNotes
• {lang}_glt / {lang}_gst — literal & simplified text
• {lang}_twl — translationWords links
• {lang}_tw — translationWords
• {lang}_ta — translationAcademy
• {lang}_tq — translationQuestions
setup.detectIntro: Enter your Door43 org. We'll read its manifests and propose a configuration — resolve anything missing or ambiguous below.
setup.confirmLanesIntro: Confirm the literal and simplified scripture repositories. These are installed directly when you apply. To change a lane's source after onboarding, use the scripture repositories section in Project mode.
setup.applyIntro: Apply this configuration for {{org}}. This installs the scripture lanes and points the editor at your repositories.
setup.projectNotEmpty: This database already holds project data for a different org. One database serves one org/project at a time — switching would let old content export into the new org. Start from a fresh database to onboard a different org.
setup.laneBusy: A scripture source replacement is in progress. Finish or cancel it before applying a new configuration.
setup.applyFailed: Could not apply the configuration. Please try again.
setup.doneConfigured: {{org}} is configured. Importing and translating books is the next step — do that from the editor.
setup.orgIdentityIntro: This is the organization this workspace serves. One database serves one org, so it can't be changed here. Confirm the resource language below.
setup.orgLoadFailed: Could not load this workspace's organization. Reload and try again.
setup.resourceLanguageHelp: The language of the text and notes you are producing. Pre-filled from your org's manifests where possible.
setup.sourcesIntro: Choose the repositories you pull FROM. Each resource is checked by default and pulls from the upstream org below; uncheck one to leave it blank or point it at a different source.
setup.upstreamOrgHelp: The org you translate from. Defaults to unfoldingWord.
setup.upstreamOrgError: Could not verify that org on Door43. Check the spelling and try again.
setup.upstreamOrgUnverified: This upstream org hasn't been verified yet. It will be checked when you leave the field.

sourceUrlError.invalid: That doesn't look like a Door43 repository URL.
sourceUrlError.unreachable: Door43 is unreachable right now — try again.
sourceUrlError.no_books: This source has no scripture book files — pick a valid source.

setup.lanesIntro: These are YOUR org's repositories — the text you edit and export TO. Confirm the target repo, whether you're editing or only aligning, and where each lane pulls from.
setup.targetRepoHelp: Your org's repo for this lane. Pre-filled but editable — it needn't be {lang}_glt (e.g. ru_rlob, ar_avd).
setup.laneEditModeLabel: What are translators doing in this lane?
setup.reviewIntro: Review the {{lang}} configuration for {{org}} before applying.
setup.reviewIncomplete: Some resource repositories are still missing or ambiguous. Resolve them before applying.
setup.laneSourceMigration: Setup can't change the scripture source for {{lanes}} on a project that already has text — that's a migration. Revert the source below to keep the current one, or use "Change scripture source" in Preferences to do it deliberately.
setup.identityChangedRevert: This project already has data, so its org, export target, and resource repos can't change here. Revert your repo edits to the current configuration to apply a language or lane-mode tweak, or start from a fresh database to onboard a different org.
setup.revertAllRepos: Revert all repos to current configuration
setup.replacementStepIntro: You changed the scripture source for an already-populated project, so the new text must be staged before it goes live. This step finishes that change; nothing changes for editors until you press Activate.
setup.replacementIntro: This stages the new source text book by book. When every book is ready, press Activate to switch the lane over.
setup.replacementNone: No lane needs a source change. You can continue.
setup.upstreamOrgUnreachable: Door43 is unreachable right now — retry to verify this org.
setup.laneModeFailed: Couldn't set {{lanes}} to the chosen edit/align mode — retry before continuing so the lane isn't left editable by mistake.
setup.laneModeRetryError: Couldn't set {{lane}} to “{{mode}}” — retry. Until this succeeds the lane stays editable.
setup.replacementContinueBlocked: Activate each lane above and confirm its edit/align setting to continue.
setup.unverifiedOverride: These resources point at a source URL that hasn't verified yet — verify or clear them before continuing: {{resources}}.
setup.replacementActionRequired: Action required — retry or waive the flagged books below before this lane can be activated.
setup.replacementConfirmWarning: Activating will OVERWRITE the current text and alignment for the books below with the new source. This cannot be undone from here.
setup.replacementConfirmNoBookList: The affected books couldn't be listed, but every imported book in this lane will be replaced.
setup.replacementConfirmAck: I understand existing text for these books will be replaced.
